record.field: Open a specific Odoo record in the main view.

{"type":"object","properties":{"model":{"type":"string","description":"Odoo model technical name (e.g. sale.order, res.partner)"},"record_id":{"type":"integer","description":"Record ID to navigate to"}},"required":["model","record_id"]}
Search any Odoo model using natural language. Returns matching records with ID and name.

{"type":"object","properties":{"model":{"type":"string","description":"Odoo model technical name (e.g. sale.order, res.partner)"},"query":{"type":"string","description":"Natural language search query"},"limit":{"type":"integer","description":"Maximum number of results to return","default":5}},"required":["model","query"]}
Get field values from a specific Odoo record by model and ID.

{"type":"object","properties":{"model":{"type":"string","description":"Odoo model technical name"},"record_id":{"type":"integer","description":"Record ID to read"},"fields":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"},"description":"List of field names to read (optional, returns name/id if omitted)"}},"required":["model","record_id"]}
Get a summary of the current CRM pipeline grouped by stage with counts and expected revenue.
Get the current on-hand quantity for a specific product.
Get a list of open customer invoices with amounts and due dates, ordered by due date ascending.
Search the company knowledge base using RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation). Returns citation-first results with source metadata. Readonly — no confirmation needed.

{"type":"object","properties":{"query":{"type":"string","description":"Natural language question to search the knowledge base"},"source_filter":{"type":"string","description":"Optional source type filter (e.g. 'bir', 'policy', 'handbook')"},"max_results":{"type":"integer","description":"Maximum results to return","default":5}},"required":["query"]}
Create a new Odoo record. REQUIRES USER CONFIRMATION before execution.

{"type":"object","properties":{"model":{"type":"string","description":"Odoo model technical name"},"values":{"type":"object","description":"Field name to value mapping for the new record"}},"required":["model","values"]}
Update fields on an existing Odoo record. REQUIRES USER CONFIRMATION before execution.

{"type":"object","properties":{"model":{"type":"string","description":"Odoo model technical name"},"record_id":{"type":"integer","description":"ID of the record to update"},"values":{"type":"object","description":"Field name to new value mapping"}},"required":["model","record_id","values"]}
Post a message in a record's chatter (message log). REQUIRES USER CONFIRMATION.

{"type":"object","properties":{"model":{"type":"string","description":"Odoo model technical name"},"record_id":{"type":"integer","description":"Record ID to post the message on"},"message":{"type":"string","description":"Message content to post in the chatter"}},"required":["model","record_id","message"]}
Create a follow-up activity on a record. REQUIRES USER CONFIRMATION.

{"type":"object","properties":{"model":{"type":"string","description":"Odoo model technical name"},"record_id":{"type":"integer","description":"Record ID to schedule the activity on"},"summary":{"type":"string","description":"Activity summary/title"},"date":{"type":"string","description":"Deadline date in YYYY-MM-DD format"},"activity_type":{"type":"string","description":"Activity type (e.g. todo, email, call)","default":"todo"}},"required":["model","record_id","summary","date"]}
Validate (post) a draft invoice. Changes state from draft to posted. REQUIRES USER CONFIRMATION.
Create a new sales quotation for a customer partner. REQUIRES USER CONFIRMATION.
Confirm a sale order, moving it from quotation to sale state. REQUIRES USER CONFIRMATION.
Trigger a configured n8n automation workflow via webhook. REQUIRES USER CONFIRMATION. Workflow must be allowlisted in ssot/bridges/catalog.yaml and configured via ir.config_parameter.

{"type":"object","properties":{"workflow_id":{"type":"string","description":"n8n workflow ID from the allowlist (matches ir.config_parameter key suffix)"},"data":{"type":"object","description":"Data payload to pass to the n8n webhook"}},"required":["workflow_id"]}
Search BIR tax compliance documents (revenue regulations, memoranda, TRAIN law). Returns citation-first results with issuance numbers. Readonly — no confirmation needed.

{"type":"object","properties":{"query":{"type":"string","description":"Tax compliance question (e.g. '1601-C filing deadline', 'TRAIN law tax brackets')"},"max_results":{"type":"integer","description":"Maximum results to return","default":5}},"required":["query"]}
List pending activities (todos, approvals) for the current user or a specified user.

{"type":"object","properties":{"user_id":{"type":"integer","description":"Odoo user ID (defaults to current user if omitted)"},"limit":{"type":"integer","description":"Maximum activities to return","default":10}}}
Mark a pending activity as done or execute its action. REQUIRES USER CONFIRMATION.

{"type":"object","properties":{"activity_id":{"type":"integer","description":"ID of the mail.activity to execute"},"feedback":{"type":"string","description":"Optional feedback message"}},"required":["activity_id"]}
